name: connect_modeler_auto
description: Automatically discover running LightWave Modeler instances on the local network and connect to the first one found. Use this as a convenient shortcut instead of manually calling discover_lightwave followed by connect_modeler. Returns the connection ID and details on success.

address.description: Optional. The IP address or hostname to connect to. If not provided, uses the address from the first discovered Modeler instance, or defaults to 'localhost' (127.0.0.1).

port.description: Optional. The command port number for the LightWave Modeler instance. If not provided, uses the port from the first discovered Modeler instance.
